_README: Ground truth for Alliance Bank sample PDFs. Keyed by PDF filename. Fill numbers from the statement's TOTAL DEBIT/CREDIT line. is_dr_balance=true for BIZ REF PROG CA / overdraft accounts where all balances carry a 'DR' suffix. Leave fields as null if not yet verified.

AB - NOV'25.pdf.notes: Placeholder — replace nulls with values from the PDF's TOTAL line. This file is the TEMPLATE; copy+edit per sample.

AB - OCT'25.pdf.notes: Totals verified from PDF TOTAL DEBIT/CREDIT line (page 11). transaction_count is approximate — adjust after first audit run confirms exact count.
